case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,240.00 U.S. CU et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,240.00 U.S. CU RRENCY DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $620.00 BE RELEASED TO ERIC SAFIRE ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT JASON FRIEDMAN AND JOHN FORSYTH ON BEHALF OF JESSICA BARBETTA. IT IF FURTHER ORDERED THAT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $620.00 IS DECLARED FORFEITED AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED AS PROVIDED BY H&S CODE 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY ALL PARTIES. PARTIES TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUITE AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA BARBETTA, JESSICA FRIEDMAN, JASON
